overall.description: A nighttime scene in GTA V featuring heavy rain on a city street. A character runs along a wet sidewalk before the camera turns left at an intersection, crosses the road, and continues down Sunset Blvd. The environment features wet pavement reflections, street lighting, palm trees, and moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban sidewalk in heavy rain

events.description: character in denim jacket runs past camera and exits frame to the left
camera begins turning left toward the street intersection

agents.ego_description: running along the rain-soaked sidewalk under tree cover, approaching a busy intersection

notable_agents.action: character wearing a beanie and denim jacket running along the sidewalk before moving out of frame

entered.detail: mature tree with thick trunk and dense canopy overhanging the wet sidewalk
tall decorative lamp post casting warm yellow light through the rain
low-rise commercial structures with illuminated windows across the multi-lane road
busy intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk markings visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night with a game character running along a wet sidewalk next to a busy road. The camera follows at a running pace, passing under a large olive tree and street lamps, approaching a well-lit intersection with commercial buildings visible across the street.

events.description: steps off the sidewalk and enters the street intersection crosswalk
yellow sports car drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: turning left and crossing the multi-lane intersection, navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car speeding through the intersection during the crossing
dark sedan stopped at the intersection with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: brightly illuminated gas station with canopy and pumps visible across the intersection
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dark rainy sky
white painted zebra crossing lines on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and crosses the wide intersection, moving from the sidewalk onto the asphalt crosswalk. A yellow sports car passes through the intersection while a gas station with bright lights and tall palm trees become visible in the background. The wet pavement reflects the street lights and vehicle headlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: Sunset Blvd street with parked cars and residential buildings

events.description: fire truck with flashing red lights passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: proceeding straight down the rain-soaked street, passing rows of parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: fire truck with red emergency lights driving away down the street

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles along the curb including a blue sedan and dark SUVs
multi-story residential buildings with illuminated windows lining the street
continuous line of trees forming a canopy over the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera continues down Sunset Blvd, passing parked cars and apartment buildings. A fire truck with flashing lights drives past on the right. The street is lined with trees and the wet asphalt continues to reflect the street lamps in the heavy rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked city street that transitions from a narrow sidewalk run into a wide crossing of a bustling urban intersection. It begins by trailing a character running past a large olive tree and street lamps under a heavy downpour, moving steadily toward a brightly lit commercial intersection. As the camera turns left, it shifts from the sidewalk onto the asphalt crosswalk, passing a yellow sports car while the glow of a distant gas station and tall palm trees emerges through the rain. The scene then expands as the camera continues down Sunset Blvd, gliding past parked cars and apartment buildings while a fire truck with flashing lights streaks past on the right. Finally, the movement settles into a steady pace along the wet boulevard, where the dark asphalt continuously reflects the shimmering street lamps and city lights.
